stemHtml: The navigation database of an FMS is stored as read-only and the pilot…

options.a: Can only read the navigation data for 28 days. Afterwards, the memory is erased automatically.
options.b: Can only change the performance related data in this database.
options.c: Can update and adjust stored waypoints and SID/STAR data.
options.d: Can NOT change or overwrite any of the navigation data.
